name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot m13403 White & Colorful】This replica Louis Vuitton x Murakami collaboration series classic card holder brings a playful new interpretation with rainbow tones. Made of coated canvas, the classic Monogram pattern is designed with the iconic vivid colors of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami, while the top is accented with a bright pink color. The card holder is suitable for large business cards and receipts inside, and features two classic card slots on the outside. 11 x 7 x 0.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
